objects.text:
canvas_get_basic_info
Document metadata, object counts, viewport, selection & linked projects

canvas_get_document
Full Canvas document — every object in the scene

canvas_get_tree_summary
Hierarchical tree view of all objects

canvas_get_object_info
All properties for a specific object by ID

canvas_get_children
Child objects inside a frame or group

canvas_get_selection
Objects currently selected by the user

canvas_get_screenshot
Screenshot of the visible canvas surface

canvas_get_annotations
Comments & annotations attached to objects

canvas_get_linked_projects
All code projects linked to this canvas

canvas_get_guide
Collaboration instructions for a given topic

canvas_create_frame
Create a plain, image, or site-embedded frame

canvas_create_objects
Create native objects: text, shapes, stickies, etc.

canvas_update_objects
Patch existing objects by ID (position, style, text)

canvas_apply_patch
Apply a raw JSON patch to the document

canvas_set_text_content
Set text on a text or comment object

canvas_rename_objects
Rename objects by their IDs

canvas_move_objects
Reposition objects to new coordinates

canvas_duplicate_objects
Copy existing objects in place

canvas_delete_objects
Permanently remove objects by ID

canvas_link_project
Link a code project directory to this canvas

canvas_unlink_project
Remove a linked project from this canvas

canvas_set_preview_url
Set the live preview URL for a frame

canvas_create_project_preview
Create a new project preview frame

canvas_mark_working
Signal that the agent is actively editing objects

canvas_finish_working
Clear the agent's working indicator

① Read first — call get_basic_info before editing to understand current state

② Incremental patches — update specific objects, don't replace the whole scene

③ Use stable IDs — always reference object IDs returned by read tools, never guess

④ Name clearly — give descriptive labels to frames and major objects

⑤ Verify visually — call get_screenshot after meaningful changes to confirm result

⑥ Ask before destructive ops — confirm before mass-delete or unlinking projects

⑦ Use working indicators — mark_working when editing; finish_working when done
Canvas MCP Surface — All Tools & Instructions
